description: Global design system updates, typography refinement, navigation polish, footer improvements, enhanced cursor/interactions, and section transitions. This feature handles the cross-cutting visual quality improvements that make the site feel cohesive and premium.
steps: Update app/globals.css:
- Refine editorial typography classes: ensure text-editorial-xl uses a size that works well without breaking layouts (clamp(3.5rem, 10vw, 9rem) instead of 12rem max)
- Add a text-editorial-sm class for medium-large text (clamp(1.5rem, 3vw, 2.5rem))
- Add smooth section transition utilities: a .section-overlap class that uses negative margin-top with relative z-index for overlapping section effects
- Add a subtle body background texture: very faint noise or grain at 1-2% opacity using CSS
- Improve scrollbar styling: make it thinner and more subtle
- Add custom animation keyframes for floating/breathing effects used by decorative elements
Update components/Navigation/Navigation.tsx:
- Make the logo text slightly larger and bolder for better brand presence
- Ensure the navigation background transition is smooth (transparent -> white with blur)
- The nav height should be consistent (h-20 is good)
Update components/Footer/Footer.tsx:
- Add a visual separator between the CTA area and the footer columns (a decorative line or gradient)
- Ensure the CTA headline uses proper editorial sizing (text-editorial-md, not text-editorial-lg which may be too big for this context)
- Add subtle hover animation on the footer service links (underline slides in from left)
Update components/CustomCursor.tsx:
- Add a text state: when hovering over headings or large text, cursor shows a different style (e.g., becomes a small dot with 'View' text)
- Ensure the cursor is hidden on touch devices (check for touch support in useEffect and hide if touch)
- Add smooth opacity transition when cursor enters/leaves the viewport
Update components/MagneticButton.tsx:
- Increase the magnetic pull area slightly (detect mouse within a padding around the button, not just inside it)
- Add a subtle scale effect on hover (1.02x)
Add section transitions to app/page.tsx or individual sections: ensure sections flow into each other with either overlap, gradient fades, or smooth visual transitions rather than hard cuts
acceptance_criteria: Typography classes are refined and don't break layouts on any viewport
Navigation feels polished with smooth scroll-state transitions
Footer CTA is properly sized and has visual separation from footer content
Custom cursor hides on touch devices
Custom cursor has enhanced states (hover on links vs hover on text)
Section transitions feel smooth - no hard visual cuts between sections
findings: All changes verified with npm run build (11/11 pages compiled) and npm run lint (0 errors). Typography classes refined to smaller max sizes. Custom cursor now hides on touch devices, has viewport enter/leave opacity transitions, and expands follower to 60px on heading hover. MagneticButton has 1.03x scale on hover and 20px extended detection padding. Footer CTA uses text-editorial-md, has gradient separator, and service links slide right on hover. Navigation adds shadow-sm when scrolled. Services section has border-t for visual separation from DesignShowcase.
